item.title: Water tension is weird
item.description: Water surface tension is surprisingly strong, often acting like a stretchy, protective film due to hydrogen bonding and cohesion

media:content.media:title: Water tension is weird
media:content.media:description: Water surface tension is surprisingly strong, often acting like a stretchy, protective film due to hydrogen bonding and cohesion

item.title: The reverse miracle ​
item.description: How does the reverse domino effect work?

media:content.media:title: The reverse miracle ​
media:content.media:description: How does the reverse domino effect work?

item.title: Can an umbrella be a parachute?
item.description: In this video I test if it is possible to use umbrellas instead of a parachute. I test it by holding onto two large umbrellas as I jump off of different things into a pool. I compare this to when I'm not holding the umbrella and see how much they slowed me down. Then I talk about if umbrellas could be used to replace a parachute during skydiving!

media:content.media:title: Can an umbrella be a parachute?
media:content.media:description: In this video I test if it is possible to use umbrellas instead of a parachute. I test it by holding onto two large umbrellas as I jump off of different things into a pool. I compare this to when I'm not holding the umbrella and see how much they slowed me down. Then I talk about if umbrellas could be used to replace a parachute during skydiving!

item.title: Giant magnet moves a mouse
item.description: I use a giant neodymium magnet to move a mouse through diamagnetism

item.title: Creating a floating water bridge?
item.description: In this video I show you how a water bridge or water thread is made using high voltage. I talk about the mysteries related to the phenomenon.

media:content.media:title: Creating a floating water bridge?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how a water bridge or water thread is made using high voltage. I talk about the mysteries related to the phenomenon.

item.title: Avogadro's number is big
item.description: In this video I say "Avogadro's Number" Avogadro's Number of times. Along the way I tell you crazy facts about the numbers that I am reaching. Lets just say that Avogadro's Number is really big....Can you make it to the end?

media:content.media:title: Avogadro's number is big

item.title: How to make ghost smoke
item.description: When these two vapors meet, they form a thick white smoke of solid ammonium chloride crystals.

media:content.media:title: How to make ghost smoke

item.title: The science behind fast card throwing
item.description: The secret behind the world’s fastest card thrower

media:content.media:title: The science behind fast card throwing
media:content.media:description: The secret behind the world’s fastest card thrower

item.title: A metal heart beating
item.description: In this video I show you how to make a gallium beating heart. I show you the reaction that happens when you add gallium to sulfuric acid and then touch iron to the beaded up gallium. It causes a pulsing action due to the surface of the gallium reacting with the sulfuric acid and then reversing once it touches the iron.

media:content.media:title: A metal heart beating
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how to make a gallium beating heart. I show you the reaction that happens when you add gallium to sulfuric acid and then touch iron to the beaded up gallium. It causes a pulsing action due to the surface of the gallium reacting with the sulfuric acid and then reversing once it touches the iron.
